news.title: EMHware CMS Go-Live
news.body: Centralized intake system launches across all KCA programs. Training sessions are being scheduled.

events.title: HART Hub Team Huddle
events.body: Weekly integrated care team meeting. All onsite staff expected.

careteam.title: CareTeam: Getting Started
careteam.description: Account setup, navigation, and dashboard overview.

careteam.description: Step-by-step guide to submitting internal and partner referrals.

careteam.description: Adding client details, updating status, and documentation.

toolkit.title: Toolkit Overview
toolkit.description: Navigating the staff toolkit, search, and quick access features.

toolkit.description: How to use the triage steps, safety screen, and assign service tiers.

toolkit.description: Priority rules, routing, and how to sequence referrals correctly.

onboarding.title: Welcome to the HART Hub
onboarding.description: Introduction to the HART Hub model, partner agencies, and your role.

onboarding.title: Cultural Safety & Two-Eyed Seeing
onboarding.description: Foundations of culturally responsive practice in the Kenora context.

onboarding.title: Day-to-Day Operations
onboarding.description: Shift expectations, huddle structure, documentation, and escalation protocols.

sectionText.heroSubtitle: Your comprehensive guide to intake, triage, referral pathways, service coordination, and culturally responsive care delivery. Everything you need in one place.
sectionText.overviewDescription: Jump to any section of the toolkit. Every resource you need for onboarding and daily practice.
sectionText.rolesDescription: Funded positions across partner agencies delivering onsite and offsite HART Hub services.
sectionText.triageDescription: Step-by-step process from first contact through tier assignment and referral initiation.
sectionText.referralsDescription: Sequential, not shotgun — one anchoring referral first, then build based on readiness and response.
sectionText.servicesDescription: What HART Hub offers in scope, what requires external referral, and your decision guide for each situation.
sectionText.housingDescription: Supportive housing is a core outcome of the HART Hub model — not an adjunct service.
sectionText.caseManagementDescription: Overview of case management and service navigation across partner agencies.
sectionText.formsDescription: Key documentation templates for client intake, consent, and information sharing.
sectionText.contactsDescription: All HART Hub funded positions listed by agency. Filter by agency to find the contact you need.
sectionText.trainingDescription: Video resources for onboarding, platform training, and daily practice.
sectionText.visualsDescription: Click any diagram to view it in full size.
